name: composite-dispatch without a profile produces its routed verdict with no profile marker (the config plane is purely additive)
command: printf 'name: app\n' > config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file config.yaml 2>e.txt; ! grep -q 'profile=' e.txt && grep -q 'dispatch file=' e.txt && echo routed-baseline-unchanged 1>&2
